the thing dey work proper proper
I buy am for my shop
customers dey ask for am everyday

review_anchors.text: See ehn, this inverter na serious something for my shop. When NEPA take light, e dey carry all my equipment - computer, printer, everything. The thing strong well well, I don buy am for 8 months now, no wahala. Biko if you get business, this one go help you proper.

Nna mehn, this phone e shock me! Camera quality very correct, battery life strong pass. I dey use am snap parts for my customers when dem no fit come shop. My pikin for university say na good choice I make. The thing worth every kobo wey I pay.

This printer dey work but e get small wahala with the connection sometimes. For business like mine wey I dey print invoice and receipt everyday, e suppose connect faster. But the print quality fine, paper no dey jam. Na just the network issue dey worry me small.
